allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3901 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ $procId=\($c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1\); "3901 LISTENING \(PID $procId\)"; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$procId"\).CommandLine } else { "3901 DOWN" }; "--- all node procs ---"; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId,@{n='Cmd';e={ if\($_.CommandLine\){$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(90,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)} }})

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 4312,25716 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3901 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "3901 after cleanup: $\(if\($c\){'still up'}else{'free'}\)")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3901 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $procId=\($c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1\); "3901 owner PID: $procId"; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$procId"\).CommandLine)

PowerShell(foreach\($p in 3900,3901,3000,3001,3002\){ $c=Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "{0}: {1}" -f $p, $\(if\($c\){'UP'}else{'DOWN'}\) }; "--- HTTP CRM ---"; foreach\($u in @\("http://localhost:3900/admin/viettel-customers/revenue","http://localhost:3901/api/docs"\)\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 -MaximumRedirection 3; "$u -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" }catch{ "$u -> $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8787 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Killing PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } } else { Write-Output "No listener on 8787" })
